desc:
Overseers log – #16 This is a bit different from the other logs and requires you to visit Site Alpha after a nuke has been launched. If a nuke hasn't been triggered, then it won't appear, and you have to retrieve it while the nuke's effects are still active. It will be on a metal shelf across from the elevator.
Grid G5 (X: 2612.7, Y: 1935.9)
Submitted By MrCrazy
